purpose.primary_goal: Authenticate the user and establish a session.

actions.label: Sign in
actions.description: Submit login form with username and password.

test_cases.name: empty_username
errors: Username is required.

test_cases.name: empty_password
errors: Password is required.

test_cases.name: empty_username_and_password
errors: Username is required.
Password is required.

test_cases.name: invalid_email_format
errors: Please enter a valid email address.

test_cases.name: invalid_credentials
errors: Invalid username or password.

test_cases.name: account_locked
errors: Account is locked due to too many failed attempts. Try again in 15 minutes or reset your password.

test_cases.name: account_disabled
errors: This account has been disabled. Contact support.

test_cases.name: account_pending_verification
errors: Please verify your email before signing in.

test_cases.name: password_expired
errors: Your password has expired. You will be redirected to change it.

test_cases.name: rate_limited
errors: Too many login attempts. Please try again later.

test_cases.name: session_expired
errors: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

test_cases.name: network_error
errors: Unable to connect. Please check your connection and try again.

test_cases.name: server_error
errors: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again later.

test_cases.name: captcha_required
errors: Please complete the security verification.

test_cases.name: maintenance_mode
errors: Login is temporarily unavailable for maintenance.

test_cases.name: username_too_short
errors: Username must be at least 3 characters.

test_cases.name: password_too_short
errors: Password must be at least 8 characters.

test_cases.name: csrf_invalid
errors: Security validation failed. Please refresh and try again.

test_cases.name: ip_blocked
errors: Access from your location is not permitted.
